title: CrossBot puzzle contract
description: Normalized crossword representation exchanged between the extension and the backend. Loosely aligned with the .ipuz format so file import can be added later. See docs/ARCHITECTURE.md section 4.

coord.description: A [row, col] cell coordinate, zero-indexed from the top-left.

cell.description: One grid cell: null = block, "" = empty fillable cell, a single uppercase letter = a given/known letter.

slot.description: One answer position (an across or down entry).

number.description: The grid number shown at the slot's first cell.

cells.description: Ordered cell coordinates from the slot's start to end.

clue.description: The clue text. May be empty if unknown (e.g. partial scrape).

clueRef.description: A clue referenced by grid number + direction; the backend attaches it to the matching derived entry.

slotAnswer.description: The solver's answer for a single slot.

answer.description: Uppercase letters, length == slot length, or null if unsolved.

Puzzle.description: Produced by site adapters, manual entry, or file import; consumed by the solver.

source.description: Where the puzzle came from, e.g. "manual", "guardian", "amuse".

cells.description: Row-major grid; cells[row][col]. Length == height; each row length == width.

slots.description: Optional. Manual entry omits these and the backend derives them; site adapters may supply them with clues.

clues.description: Optional. Clues keyed by number+direction; the backend numbers the grid and attaches them. Use instead of `slots` when cell coordinates aren't computed client-side.

SolveResult.description: Returned by POST /solve; consumed by the overlay/UI.

filled.description: The grid with answers filled in, same shape as Puzzle.cells.
